heading: Authorization of appropriations for reforestation and revegetation
label: 581k Authorization of appropriations for reforestation and revegetation
text: For the purpose of carrying out the provisions of this joint resolution on national-forest lands and other lands under the administration or control of the Forest Service of the Department of Agriculture, including the acquisition of land or interests therein for nurseries, there is authorized to be appropriated to remain available until December 31 of the ensuing fiscal year, $3,000,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $5,000,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $7,000,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $8,000,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $10,000,000 for the fiscal year ending ; a like amount for each subsequent year through the fiscal year ending , and thereafter such amounts as may be needed for reforestation; and $1,500,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $1,750,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $2,000,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $2,500,000 for the fiscal year ending ; $3,000,000 for the fiscal year ending ; a like amount for each subsequent year through the fiscal year ending , and thereafter such amounts as may be needed for range revegetation.June 30, 1951June 30, 1952June 30, 1953June 30, 1954June 30, 1955June 30, 1965June 30, 1951June 30, 1952June 30, 1953June 30, 1954June 30, 1955June 30, 1965
notes: References in TextThis joint resolution, referred to in text, means Joint Res. 53, , , which is classified to this section and .Oct. 11, 1949, ch. 67463 Stat. 762section 581j of this title
